description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This Espirit watch comes with two extra bezels. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments Dial style: Black dial with silver and white hands and crystal embellishments on the dial Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant Size Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
